title: 全力でダービーを目指すなら

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the morning of tryouts, Umamusume get ready to show off their
skills in hopes of being scouted by spectating trainers.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uwaaagh! It's sooo touching!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No matter the distance, they have the guts to move forward, step by
tiny step! They don't give in, even with those little bodies! Be brave
and carry that huge load!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wahaaagh! It's so... It's so amaziiing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're amazing, little ants!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Right! Ants are the best!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: They're trying... so hard! Waaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Don't tell me! You're gearing to go after watching them too, am
I right?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know just how you feel! Seeing them work their hearts out
really boosts my spirits! Fills me with courage! Sets my soul on fiiire!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm exactly the same! Today's a super important race, but now I know I
can blast through it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The ants got me ready to win, and I've made a new friend who's as pumped from watching them as I am...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm WAAAY happy! Whoo-hooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oh geez, she thinks I'm into ants...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey... Would you stop screaming? It's still morning, and your yelling's
rattling my head.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh! Taishin! It's Taishin! Good mooorning! I'm so glad to see you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Right in my ears now... Ugh, that hurts.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously... Not that I care, but do you really have time to idle away
here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Idle? I'm never idling. I'm always geared up and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean, dummy! Aren't you also racing in today's
tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If you are, you'd better stop standing around staring at ants!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh my gooosh! No way! It's time already?! Thanks, Taishin.
You're so kind for telling me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean... sniffle... really... Your friendship... just means... so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Who said anything about friendship?! Ugh, whatever. This girl is
crazy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wha! Wait, wait, wait! I'm coming too! Welp, fellow ant-fan, guess I'll
see ya arooound!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a weird way to start the day, but I decide to head over to the
racetrack as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tons of trainers are already at the track talking about who's racing
today, each looking to meet the most talented Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some are even discussing the energetic student from earlier, Winning
Ticket...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's in the 1,200-meter turf race! I just love the way she runs. She
never holds back!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but it's not always good to go in full charge. That
no-holds-barred spirit is commendable, but you can't win a race with
heart alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it comes to the last race of the tryouts, and Winning Ticket is
there...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leaders crossed the 600-meter mark! What a sudden turn of
events!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Everybody's running all out! Nooo sweat! Time for me to go all
out too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here comes Winning Ticket! She's not far behind and gaining
speed! That's some amazing sprinting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She got off to an extraordinary start, but then...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hrgh! Uuugh! Full... poweeer...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're round the fourth corner and into the final stretch! Winning
Ticket's falling behind! She's losing it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her outstanding opening performance, she's unable to sustain
her lead, and finishes in fifth place.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ghaaaaah! This is the wooorst!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I won't let it stop me! I'm not gonna quit! One day, I'm for sure
gonna—

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Ticket! The results might not have been what you wanted... but you
ran a nice race! Good job out there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wha! W-wow... Thank you! Wait, could it be? Are you scouting me?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoo-hooooo! Together, we'll definitely win...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: THE JAPANESE DERBY!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Murmur...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A rush of hushed voices all utter in disbelief at the idea of Winning
Ticket winning the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Th-the Japanese Derby? Um, Ticket, are you saying you want to be a
Derby champion?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You've got that right! That's the reason I came to Tracen
Academy!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Listen... I'm sorry. You're one heck of a sprinter, but I don't have what
it takes to get you ready for the Japanese Derby... I'm really sorry.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What? Hey, wait a sec!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket attempts to stop the reluctant trainer from leaving,
but to no avail.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awww, I couldn't get scouted... I could just... cryyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But I won't back down! I won't give up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I have to go all out until the day I win the Derby! Full Speeeeed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stubbornly keeps repeating that she'll win the derby as she
disappears in the distance. It leaves quite the impression.
